name: Benji Webbe
description:
'''Clive John''' "'''Benji'''" '''Webbe''' (born 11 March 1967) is a Welsh singer, best known as the lead vocalist for the [[reggae rock|reggae]] [[Heavy metal music|metal]] band [[Skindred]]. Aside from his main project, he is also active in Diamond Spider, [[Dub War]], [[Mass Mental]] and his own solo project. He has featured on albums by [[Bullet for My Valentine]], [[Soulfly]], [[The Alarm]], and Punk Rock Factory.

Webbe is a native of [[Newport, Wales|Newport]], South Wales, and a veteran of the rock explosion of the mid-1990s which led to ''[[Spin (magazine)|Spin]]'' magazine dubbing Newport as 'The New Seattle'.
